title: Simple Planes
body:
![Small plane, large plane and helicopter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/74piZbBF/images/5bb7ca013c179792e15ff0013ee92f464e5f397d.png)
Simple Planes adds four types of aircraft:
- Small plane - uses the least amount of fuel, flies the fastest, but can only fit one player.
- Large plane - uses up more fuel, but can fit two players and allows for large upgrades and can be used to drop payloads.
- Cargo plane - uses up a lot of fuel, but fits multiple players and large upgrades
- Helicopter - similar to large plane, but can be maneuvered with much more precision.
---
![All upgrades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/74piZbBF/images/5437e82849ecae3ca55fb8f6297c18fa98162770.png)
The aircraft needs to be powered to fly, you can choose one of the following engines:
- Furnace engine - powered with solid fuel
- Liquid engine - powered with liquid fuel (lava, immersive petroleum fuels and more)
- Electric engine - powered with forge energy/redstone flux
You can turn the engine on and change its throttle with the up/down arrow keys

Aircraft can be upgraded with:
- Floaty bedding - allows the aircraft to float on water
- Booster - changes maximum engine throttle
- Armor - can be enchanted
- Folding upgrade - when leaving the aircraft you instantly get it as an item in your inventory
- Additional seats - allowing two more players to fly with you
- Shooter - can shoot arrows, fire charges and CGM ammo
- Banner - decorative

Planes specifically can be upgraded with:
- Solar panel - charges up the electric engine

Large planes and helicopters can be upgraded with:
- Chest - including iron chests
- Supply crate - could be dropped mid-flight
- TNT - could also be dropped mid-flight
- Jukebox
---
![Many planes with different materials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/74piZbBF/images/befa30c22784e652a6d3e1fe1f44ab0d5e0a46ea.png)
You can use any wood you like to craft an aircraft, including modded ones. You can make it fireproof by using the nether planks.

---
